requirement_topic.en: EMC and Wireless Type Approval for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics — Kenya (CA) vs CE
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的EMC与无线型号核准——肯尼亚（CA）与CE对比
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的EMC與無線型號核准——肯亞（CA）與CE對比

summary.en: Kenya does not require CE marking — that is an EU mark and has no legal standing in Kenya. For power banks (portable battery packs with charging circuitry, USB outputs, display) the safety/EMC aspects are handled through the KEBS PVoC programme against the applicable Kenya Standards (which adopt the relevant IEC/CISPR electromagnetic-compatibility texts). If the power bank incorporates radio functionality (Qi wireless charging, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), it becomes radio communications equipment and requires Type Approval / Type Acceptance from the Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) before it may be imported, sold, or operated, under the Kenya Information and Communications Act. CA type approval verifies the device operates within Kenya's authorised frequency bands and meets technical/EMC limits; many devices already approved to international standards (e.g., holding equivalent certifications) can be processed, but a Kenya-specific CA approval and CA mark are still required. There is no single 'CE-equivalent' self-declared mark; instead the controls are PVoC (KEBS) plus CA type approval for radio.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚不要求CE标志——CE是欧盟标志，在肯尼亚无法律效力。对于移动电源（含充电电路、USB输出、显示屏的便携式电池组），其安全/EMC方面通过KEBS PVoC计划依据适用肯尼亚标准（采用相关IEC/CISPR电磁兼容文本）处理。若移动电源含无线功能（Qi无线充电、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），即成为无线电通信设备，须依据《肯尼亚信息与通信法》在进口、销售或使用前取得肯尼亚通信管理局（CA）的型号核准/型号认可。CA型号核准核实设备在肯尼亚授权频段内运行并满足技术/EMC限值；许多已按国际标准取得认证的设备可被受理，但仍须取得肯尼亚特定的CA核准及CA标志。不存在单一的「CE等效」自我声明标志；相应控制为PVoC（KEBS）加无线电的CA型号核准。
summary.zht: 肯亞不要求CE標誌——CE是歐盟標誌，在肯亞無法律效力。對於行動電源（含充電電路、USB輸出、顯示幕的便攜式電池組），其安全/EMC方面通過KEBS PVoC計劃依據適用肯亞標準（採用相關IEC/CISPR電磁相容文本）處理。若行動電源含無線功能（Qi無線充電、藍牙電量指示、NFC），即成為無線電通訊設備，須依據《肯亞資訊與通訊法》在進口、銷售或使用前取得肯亞通訊管理局（CA）的型號核准/型號認可。CA型號核准核實設備在肯亞授權頻段內運行並滿足技術/EMC限值；許多已按國際標準取得認證的設備可被受理，但仍須取得肯亞特定的CA核准及CA標誌。不存在單一的「CE等效」自我聲明標誌；相應控制為PVoC（KEBS）加無線電的CA型號核准。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Information and Communications Act (Cap 411A) — Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) Type Approval / Type Acceptance for radio communications equipment
KEBS PVoC programme and applicable Kenya Standards adopting IEC/CISPR EMC texts (e.g., KS CISPR 32 / KS CISPR 35 family for emissions/immunity)
Communications Authority of Kenya — Type Approval Regulations and frequency allocation framework

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, Class B) and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity). Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT, which is specific to Chinese frequency allocations and is not recognised by the Communications Authority of Kenya. China has no CE mark; for domestic compulsory categories it uses CCC. Neither Chinese GB/T EMC reports nor SRRC approval transfer to Kenya: KEBS PVoC assesses EMC against the applicable KS, and CA issues its own Kenya type approval for radio equipment.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求由GB/T 9254.1-2021（辐射，B类）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度）规制。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部取得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，其针对中国频率划分，不被肯尼亚通信管理局认可。中国无CE标志；国内强制类别使用CCC。中国GB/T EMC报告与SRRC核准均不可转用于肯尼亚：KEBS PVoC依据适用KS评定EMC，CA为无线电设备签发其肯尼亚型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求由GB/T 9254.1-2021（輻射，B類）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度）規制。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部取得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，其針對中國頻率劃分，不被肯亞通訊管理局認可。中國無CE標誌；國內強制類別使用CCC。中國GB/T EMC報告與SRRC核准均不可轉用於肯亞：KEBS PVoC依據適用KS評定EMC，CA為無線電設備簽發其肯亞型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Two distinct Kenyan controls replace the EU's CE/EMC/RED scheme: (1) EMC is folded into KEBS PVoC against the applicable KS (IEC/CISPR-based) — there is no separate self-declared CE-style EMC mark; (2) any radio function triggers a mandatory Communications Authority (CA) type approval, separate from KEBS, verifying the device operates only in Kenya-authorised bands. Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC reports and SRRC approval do not transfer: SRRC is keyed to Chinese frequency plans, and CA requires its own application. Practical gaps for a Chinese exporter: (a) confirm the wireless variant's frequencies are permitted in Kenya and obtain CA type approval and the CA mark before import; (b) ensure EMC test evidence aligns with the KS adopted (CISPR-based) for PVoC; (c) a non-wireless power bank still needs PVoC but not CA approval. Note Kenya's grid is 240 V / 50 Hz — same 50 Hz as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V, so any mains-charging accessory must be rated/labelled accordingly.
gap.zh: 两项不同的肯尼亚控制取代欧盟CE/EMC/RED方案：（1）EMC并入KEBS PVoC，依据适用KS（基于IEC/CISPR）评定——不存在单独的自我声明CE式EMC标志；（2）任何无线电功能均触发强制性通信管理局（CA）型号核准，独立于KEBS，核实设备仅在肯尼亚授权频段运行。中国GB/T 9254 EMC报告及SRRC核准不可转用：SRRC对应中国频率规划，CA须另行申请。中国出口商的实务差距：（a）确认无线型号的频率在肯尼亚获许可，并在进口前取得CA型号核准及CA标志；（b）确保EMC测试证据与PVoC采用的KS（基于CISPR）一致；（c）非无线移动电源仍需PVoC但无需CA核准。注意肯尼亚电网为240 V/50 Hz——与中国同为50 Hz但标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V，故任何市电充电配件须据此标定/标注。
gap.zht: 兩項不同的肯亞控制取代歐盟CE/EMC/RED方案：（1）EMC併入KEBS PVoC，依據適用KS（基於IEC/CISPR）評定——不存在單獨的自我聲明CE式EMC標誌；（2）任何無線電功能均觸發強制性通訊管理局（CA）型號核准，獨立於KEBS，核實設備僅在肯亞授權頻段運行。中國GB/T 9254 EMC報告及SRRC核准不可轉用：SRRC對應中國頻率規劃，CA須另行申請。中國出口商的實務差距：（a）確認無線型號的頻率在肯亞獲許可，並在進口前取得CA型號核准及CA標誌；（b）確保EMC測試證據與PVoC採用的KS（基於CISPR）一致；（c）非無線行動電源仍需PVoC但無需CA核准。注意肯亞電網為240 V/50 Hz——與中國同為50 Hz但標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V，故任何市電充電配件須據此標定/標註。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC handled within KEBS PVoC against applicable KS; Communications Authority (CA) type approval mandatory before import/sale/use for any power bank with radio functions; there is no Kenyan CE mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

source.publisher: Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) — Type Approval of communications equipment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya has no CE mark. Power-bank EMC is assessed inside KEBS PVoC against IEC/CISPR-based KS, and any wireless function requires a separate Communications Authority (CA) type approval keyed to Kenya's authorised frequency bands. Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC reports and SRRC approval do not transfer. A non-wireless power bank needs PVoC only; a wireless one needs PVoC plus CA type approval before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚没有CE标志。移动电源EMC在KEBS PVoC内依据基于IEC/CISPR的KS评定，任何无线功能须另取与肯尼亚授权频段对应的通信管理局（CA）型号核准。中国GB/T 9254 EMC报告及SRRC核准不可转用。非无线移动电源仅需PVoC；无线型号在进口前须PVoC加CA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞沒有CE標誌。行動電源EMC在KEBS PVoC內依據基於IEC/CISPR的KS評定，任何無線功能須另取與肯亞授權頻段對應的通訊管理局（CA）型號核准。中國GB/T 9254 EMC報告及SRRC核准不可轉用。非無線行動電源僅需PVoC；無線型號在進口前須PVoC加CA型號核准。
